languageSelection.title: Language Selection
languageSelection.label: Language
languageSelection.hint: Language changes apply immediately and are kept for the next launch.

followSystem.label: Follow system theme
followSystem.hint: When enabled, theme selection is applied automatically based on system theme.

effectsMode.label: Visual Effect Mode
effectsMode.hint: Controls glow/blur performance. Automatic mode reduces itself on low-end systems.

reduceMotion.label: Reduced Motion
reduceMotion.hint: Uses fewer animations and transitions for a calmer interface.

sidebarMotion.label: Sidebar Animation
sidebarMotion.hint: Uses a smooth slide animation when opening and closing the left tab bar.

sfxLights.label: Sound Effect Lights
sfxLights.hint: Turns light/glow effects on or off in the sound effects screen.

sliderFx.label: Timeline/Volume Color Effects
sliderFx.hint: Turns color cycling on or off for the main and fullscreen timeline/volume sliders.

startup.title: Startup Behavior
startup.closeToTray: Minimize to system tray when closing window
startup.closeToTrayHint: If disabled, closing the window exits the app.

visualMode.hint: Full: all effects, Balanced: reduced motion, Minimal: lightest visuals.
visualMode.hintFull: Full mode: all animations and visual effects are active.
visualMode.hintBalanced: Balanced mode: animations are toned down for steadier performance.
visualMode.hintMinimal: Minimal mode: lightest visuals with minimum effects.

toastDuration.label: Listen notification duration
toastDuration.hint: Controls how long the no-signal hint stays on screen.

mode.label: Listen mode
mode.hint: Balances speed, background-music focus and accuracy.

card.normal: Clear music and fast everyday listening.
card.background: Balanced choice for music hidden behind speech and ambience.
card.max: Best for hard videos, covers and very low background music.

detail.normal: Normal Listening: Best for clear music, official tracks and fast everyday recognition.
detail.background: Background Music Focus: Better for videos where music stays behind speech, ambience or effects.
detail.max: Maximum Accuracy: Uses denser sampling and waits longer. Best for hard cases like cover, live, remix or low-volume background music.

notifications.label: Show notifications
notifications.hint: Shows notifications when a song is found, when a network error occurs, and when the audio device changes automatically.

mpris.label: Enable MPRIS
mpris.hint: Can expose recognized tracks in the Linux media panel. It does not affect recognition quality.

systray.label: Minimize to system tray
systray.hint: Keeps the listen window running in the system tray instead of closing fully.

noDuplicates.label: Avoid duplicates in history
noDuplicates.hint: Updates the previous history item instead of adding a new row when the same song is recognized again.

requestInterval.label: Shazam request interval
requestInterval.hint: Increase this if you hit rate limits.

bufferSize.label: Shazam buffer size
bufferSize.hint: Longer samples can be more stable but slightly slower.

restart.title: Restart required
restart.message: To apply the language change, the app needs to restart. Restart now?

crossfade.title: Smooth transition
crossfade.sameAlbumExcept: Except tracks from the same album / CUE file
crossfade.fadeOnPause: Fade out on pause / fade in on resume

startup.title: Startup
startup.resumePosition: Resume restored track from last position

confirm.deletePreset: Are you sure you want to delete the preset "{name}"?

errors.presetsWindowOpenFailed: Could not open presets window (presets API missing).

visualizer.notFoundBody:
Executable not found:
{path}

Linux:
- cmake --build build-visualizer
- cp build-visualizer/ardali-projectm-visualizer native-dist/ardali-projectm-visualizer

In development mode (npm run dev), build-visualizer output is preferred automatically.

ui.notImplemented: This effect is not implemented yet.

eq32.title: Professional 32‑Band Equalizer
eq32.description: Shape your sound with precise frequency control.

compressor.title: Dynamic Compressor
compressor.description: Controls dynamic range by reducing loud parts.

descriptions.limiter: Limits maximum level to prevent clipping.
descriptions.exciter: Adds harmonic content to brighten audio.
descriptions.softecho: Natural and smooth echo profile without metallic double-voice feel.
descriptions.truepeak: Professional true-peak limiting and stereo metering.
descriptions.crossfeed: Simulates speaker-like listening on headphones by blending channels.
descriptions.surround: Cinematic stage simulation with center/surround/LFE balance for stereo sources.
descriptions.bassmono: Makes low frequencies mono for better translation and vinyl/club compatibility.
descriptions.dynamiceq: Automatically adjusts EQ based on band dynamics.
descriptions.tapesat: Adds analog tape warmth and harmonic saturation.
descriptions.bitdither: Bit reduction and dither for lo-fi character or professional format conversion.

crossfeed.autoHeadphones: Auto enable/disable crossfeed according to headphone connection

device.headphones: ✓ {outputName} detected as headphones. Crossfeed is suitable.
device.usbHeadset: ✓ {outputName} detected as USB headset (output + related mic). Crossfeed is suitable.
device.speakers: ℹ {outputName} detected as speaker/line output. Crossfeed is usually unnecessary.
device.unreadable: ℹ Output info could not be read. Crossfeed remains in manual mode.

presetDescriptions.1: 🎵 Mild: Light crossfeed, minimal fatigue reduction
presetDescriptions.2: 💪 Strong: Strong crossfeed, pronounced speaker feel
presetDescriptions.3: 🌌 Wide: Wider stage, more spacious feel

presetDesc.canyon: Distant mountain-like echoes with sparse reflections.
presetDesc.cave: Dark tone with long cave-style tail.
presetDesc.studio: Short, clean, and controlled studio reflections.
presetDesc.puresoft: Pure, smooth, and fatigue-free soft echo.
presetDesc.vocal: Short and clear echo emphasizing vocals.
presetDesc.natural: Natural and balanced daily echo profile.

surround.autoMultichannel: Auto enable/disable surround on multichannel outputs (>2 channels)

hint.multi: ✓ {outputName} • {channels} channels detected. Surround mode is recommended.
hint.stereo: ℹ {outputName} • {channels} channels detected. This mode simulates virtual surround for stereo content.
hint.unreadable: ℹ Output info could not be read. Surround mode works as virtual simulation on stereo sources.

footer.engineInfo: ArDali DSP Engine v3.0 • 48kHz / 32-bit Float Processing

sfx.nativeUnavailable: ⚠️ Sound Effects unavailable: Native Audio Engine is not loaded. Basic playback is still available.

presetDescriptions.soft: 🌿 Soft: Transparent and light protection with minimal compression feel.
presetDescriptions.balanced: ⚖️ Balanced: Well-rounded limiter behavior for daily listening.
presetDescriptions.loud: 🔥 Loud: More aggressive limiting for a louder perception.
presetDescriptions.spotify: 🎵 Spotify: Safe peak control tuned for platform delivery.
presetDescriptions.youtube: 📺 YouTube: Stream-friendly peak control with medium compression.
presetDescriptions.cd: 💿 CD Master: Cleaner master approach with minimal peak margin.
presetDescriptions.broadcast: 📡 Broadcast: Tighter and safer limiting for broadcast standards.

info.title: What is Dynamic EQ?
info.body: When the selected frequency band exceeds the threshold, EQ is applied automatically. Use negative gain for de-harshing and positive gain for dynamic boost.

eqPresets.title: Presets
eqPresets.loadError: AutoEQ could not be loaded (see logs).

securityPage.title: Security
securityPage.heroSub: Use the Web tab more safely and in a controlled way.
securityPage.allowPopups: Allow pop-up windows (may be required for some logins)
securityPage.allowPopupsHint: Note: When pop-ups are disabled, some login/account links may not open.
securityPage.cleanupHint: Clearing cookies/cache may sign you out of some sites.
securityPage.allowedPlatformsHint: ArDali targets the following platforms in the Web tab (CSP/frame-src):
securityPage.vpnPolicyLabel: Block Web access when VPN is detected
securityPage.vpnPolicyHint: Recommended: keep this off. With VPN, app will warn only; non-approved websites are already blocked.

notify.invalidExternalUrl: Open a valid web page first (http/https).
notify.vpnBlocked: VPN detected. Web tab is temporarily blocked for security.
notify.vpnWarning: VPN detected. For security, only approved platforms will be allowed.
notify.urlBlocked: This address is blocked by security policy.

about.sections.app.title: App Features
about.sections.app.item1: Combines music, video, web and download workflows in one interface.
about.sections.app.item2: Includes ArDali-Pulse listening mode for fast song recognition.
about.sections.app.item3: Offers modern media controls with multi-language and system language support.
about.sections.web.title: Web Features
about.sections.web.item1: Provides secure media access for YouTube, Deezer, SoundCloud and social platforms.
about.sections.web.item2: Sessions are kept in a secure web partition (persist partition).
about.sections.web.item3: Navigation works only with allowed and validated URL rules.
about.sections.security.title: Security & Privacy
about.sections.security.item1: Sensitive data like email/password/token is not stored in app settings.
about.sections.security.item2: Web view is protected with sandbox, permission controls and domain restrictions.
about.sections.security.item3: Open in external browser is enabled only for valid http/https URLs.
about.sections.sfx.title: Sound Effects Features
about.sections.sfx.item1: Includes native C++ DSP modules: 32-band EQ, compressor, limiter, reverb, crossfeed and more.
about.sections.sfx.item2: Provides presets, real-time knob controls and persistent effect settings.
about.sections.sfx.item3: Optimized for low latency and balanced CPU usage during playback.
about.sections.visual.title: Visualization Features
about.sections.visual.item1: Runs projectM-based visualizer modes with configurable performance profiles.
about.sections.visual.item2: Gives full control over FPS, effect intensity and visual style.
about.sections.visual.item3: Generates low-latency live visuals synced with audio output.
settings.library.hero.insight.title: Live archive view
settings.library.hero.insight.subtitle: Core library signals and latest scan details are collected here.
settings.library.root.manualTracksHint: Manually added tracks are shown in the playlist. Detailed management is under Settings > Media Library.
playback.shortcuts.quickAccess.title: Shortcut Quick Access
playback.shortcuts.quickAccess.hint: Use the button below to quickly jump to keyboard key assignments.
playback.shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
playback.shortcuts.search.hint: Search: quickly find the shortcut you want (e.g. youtube, web, play).
playback.shortcuts.media.autoDetect: Auto-detect keyboard media keys (Play/Pause, Previous, Next)
playback.shortcuts.media.autoDetectHint: On many keyboards, media keys or Fn + media keys work automatically this way.
playback.shortcuts.assign.hint: Click Assign, then press the shortcut on your keyboard. Use Clear to reset.
sfx.audiophile.title: Audio Output (Audiophile)
sfx.audiophile.description: Bypass operating system bottlenecks and deliver direct, clean audio data to your DAC.
sfx.audiophile.quality.note: Note: This bar is not the live volume level; it represents output path quality.
sfx.audiophile.exclusive.title: Direct Hardware Access (Exclusive Mode)
sfx.audiophile.exclusive.hint: When enabled, the system mixer layer is bypassed where possible. Background sounds may be muted.
sfx.audiophile.device.label: Target Output Device (Audio Device)
sfx.audiophile.sampleRate.label: Sample Rate Quality
sfx.audiophile.sampleRate.hint: Tries to preserve the source file rate; when unsupported, switches to the nearest safe profile.
listen.quick.sharedNote.line1: This section only controls the Quick Listen button in the main interface.
listen.quick.sharedNote.line2: Recognition quality, target platform and repeat behavior are in Preferences inside the ArDali Listen window.
visualizerNative.picker.title: ArDali Visuals
visualizerNative.picker.heroHint: Choose presets included in auto-switch flow with a cleaner layout.
ui.startup.webExperienceEnabled.hint: When disabled, the app stays in media player mode and the Web tab is hidden.
ui.startup.webExperienceEnabled.notifyDi: Web experience is off. You can enable it in Settings.
ui.startup.notificationsEnabledHint: When disabled, in-app notifications are hidden.
settings.library.folders.title: Media Sources Management
settings.library.folders.hint: You can add or remove audio and video folders, then rescan the library.
settings.library.notify.noFolders: Add at least one media folder first.
settings.library.performance.statusWithS: Fast scan: {fast} | Lightweight mode: {light} | Scan subfolders: {subfolders} | Cover cache: {cache} MB
securityPage.cleanupCookiePortHint: You can move sessions between devices by exporting/importing cookies as JSON.
securityPage.sessionProfile.label: Web session profile
securityPage.sessionProfile.hint: Isolated profile clears cookies/cache before first web use for a clean session.
securityPage.notify.sessionIsolatedReady: Isolated web profile ready: started with a clean session.
settings.gallery.shortcuts.disabledHint: When disabled, no gallery keyboard shortcut is triggered (prevents accidental actions while typing).
settings.gallery.shortcuts.title: Gallery Keyboard Shortcuts
settings.gallery.shortcuts.assignHint: Click Assign, then press a key on your keyboard. Use Clear to remove.
settings.shortcuts.video.hint: For video, playback keys and global media keys are currently used.

sfx.audiophile.preamp.title: Analog Preamp
sfx.audiophile.preamp.hint: Fine output gain before the web DSP chain.
ui.optimizationProfile.label: Optimization Target
ui.optimizationProfile.hint: Adjusts interface, cover, web and sound effect load based on automatic or manual priority.
ui.optimizationProfile.hint.initial: Smart Auto: chooses the best profile based on power, battery and hardware.
ui.optimizationProfile.hint.ram: RAM priority: web tabs sleep, cover cache shrinks and the library runs lighter.
ui.optimizationProfile.hint.gpu: GPU priority: glow, lighting and canvas animations are reduced; album covers stay enabled.
ui.optimizationProfile.hint.battery: Battery priority: RAM and GPU savings are applied together and background FPS drops heavily.
ui.optimizationProfile.hint.quality: Visual quality priority: effects and animations stay lively; resource use may be higher.
ui.startup.sidebarIconScale.hint: Changes the size of the main sidebar icons and Web quick icons.
listen.quick.mode.detail.normal: Normal listening: clear music and fast daily use.
listen.quick.mode.detail.background: Background music focus: balanced choice for music behind speech, ambience and effects.
listen.quick.mode.detail.max: Maximum accuracy: best for difficult videos, covers and low-volume background music.
securityPage.enforceAllowlist.hint: When disabled, all valid http/https sites can be opened in the Web tab.
ui.sidebarMotion.label: Sidebar Animation
ui.sidebarMotion.hint: Uses a smooth slide animation when opening and closing the left tab bar.
settings.audio.night.mode.light.detail: Light mode gently softens sudden peaks without changing the overall feel too much.
settings.audio.night.mode.balanced.detai: Balanced mode is best for film, web video and quiet home listening.
settings.audio.night.mode.strong.detail: Strong mode suppresses peaks harder and keeps the room calmer late at night.
settings.audio.spatial.mono.detail: Mono mode narrows the stage and reduces problematic hard left/right separation.
settings.audio.spatial.stereo.detail: Stereo mode keeps the original channel image without extra widening or headphone processing.
settings.audio.spatial.spatial.detail: Spatial mode combines widening and headphone crossfeed for a larger, more immersive stage.
settings.audio.deviceKindLabel.speaker: Speaker
